step.name: model-aggregates-and-types
step.action: Map aggregates to types. Pick singular nouns (User, Order). Add nodes interface where federation or polymorphism applies.

step.name: design-mutations-with-payloads
step.action: For each mutation, define <Name>Input and <Name>Payload { entity, userErrors }. Document partial-success cases.

step.name: author-auth-directives
step.action: Define @auth(scope: ENUM_VALUE) directive. Apply to fields and mutations. Document which scopes need which resources.
step.decision-gate: If a scope doesn't apply uniformly to a type's fields, split it — single-scope-per-field is the only reviewable shape.

step.name: audit-naming
step.action: Walk every type. Verify Connection/Edge, Input, Payload conventions. Verify opaque IDs on relations.

step.name: validate-and-publish-spec
step.action: Run validate-graphql-api-design.py. Open PR with schema + auth map + naming audit.
